title: Furious enchantments
description: This project adds more enchantments to the game.
body:
# Furious Enchantments

A Fabric 1.20.1 mod that adds the **Target Lock** enchantment, enhancing combat precision and damage.

## Features

- **Target Lock Enchantment**: Level up your sword by defeating mobs to unlock higher damage boosts.
- **Glowing Target Effect**: Marked enemies glow and emit particles, making them easier to track.
- **Dynamic Damage Boosts**: Damage increases based on your sword's level, encouraging progression.
- Fully integrated with Fabric API for seamless gameplay.

## How It Works

When you attack mobs with a sword enchanted with Target Lock, you build up kills on that sword. As the sword levels up, it unlocks stronger damage bonuses and applies a glowing effect with particles on targeted mobs for easier combat focus.

---

*Currently supports Fabric 1.20.1 only.*
[![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513035d1231a86dff137c74e04a5e64633593f10.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/furious-enchantments/versions)
